content.full_text:
City of Martinez P C

525 HENRIETTA STREET • MARTINEZ
CALIFORNIA 94553 • (415) 228-4400

November 4, 1976

Mr. Michael Bennett, Executive Director
Fair Political Practices Commission
P. O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804

Dear Mr. Bennett:

Confirming our phone conversation, your letter of November 1, 1976, to Councilman James Thelen of this city
has been referred to me regarding the compliance with
Government Code Section 87207(b)(2).

The same request was made of Mr. Thelen last year, and
at that time I replied on his behalf, indicating that to
avoid useless duplication of litigation, we would hold
compliance to the section in abeyance pending the outcome
of the Wood case in Ukiah. It is my understanding that
said case is now on appeal and the decision is not final.
This, in effect, is the same position we took regarding
this matter last year.

If you have any further questions, please let me know.

Very truly yours,

JOHN E. WALTZ
Martinez City Attorney

JEW/hba

cc: Councilman James Thelen
Martinez City Hall
525 Henrietta Street
Martinez, CA 94553
